name: light-current-static-course
description: Static educational course website generated from the Light Current course CSV.

scripts.visual: npm run audit && npm run visual:plan && npm run visual:diagrams
scripts.generate: node scripts/generate-pages.js && node scripts/generate-homepage.js && node scripts/generate-tree.js && node scripts/generate-search.js && node scripts/generate-glossary.js
scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-pages.js && node scripts/check-links.js && node scripts/check-content-rules.js && node scripts/validate-visuals.js
scripts.build: npm run parse && npm run classify && npm run visual && npm run generate && npm run link && npm run validate && npm run report
scripts.test: node scripts/validate-pages.js && node scripts/check-links.js && node scripts/check-content-rules.js && node scripts/validate-visuals.js
